creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
When starting googleearth for recent Xorg 7.2 server the latter crashes, here's what's being shown in console:

$ startx
x1dd5d85e3bf54f2a05c1864c53dcd02d: not found
xauth:  creating new authority file /home/mirya/.serverauth.1432

_XSERVTransSocketOpenCOTSServer: Unable to open socket for inet6
_XSERVTransOpen: transport open failed for inet6/miryanote:0
_XSERVTransMakeAllCOTSServerListeners: failed to open listener for inet6

X Window System Version 7.2.0
Release Date: 22 January 2007
X Protocol Version 11, Revision 0, Release 7.2
Build Operating System: FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE-p5 i386
Current Operating System: FreeBSD miryanote 6.2-RELEASE-p6 FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE-p6 #28: Wed Jul 18 18:55:05 EEST 2007     mirya@miryanote:/usr/src/sys/i386/compile/MY-LITE i386
Build Date: 04 June 2007
        Before reporting problems, check http://wiki.x.org
        to make sure that you have the latest version.
Module Loader present
Markers: (--) probed, (**) from config file, (==) default setting,
        (++) from command line, (!!) notice, (II) informational,
        (WW) warning, (EE) error, (NI) not implemented, (??) unknown.
(==) Log file: "/var/log/Xorg.0.log", Time: Mon Jul 23 15:19:19 2007
(++) Using config file: "/etc/X11/XF86Config.current"
(EE) DoSwapInterval: cx = 0x8809600, GLX screen = 0x830a3c0

Fatal server error:
Caught signal 11.  Server aborting

Here're an extract from Xorg config file that may be useful too:

Section "Module"
    Load        "dbe"
    Load        "type1"
    Load        "speedo"
    Load        "freetype"
    Load       "glx"
EndSection

Section "Device"
    Identifier  "Primary Card"
    VendorName  "Unknown"
    BoardName   "i810"
    Driver     "i810"
    VideoRam    65536
EndSection

Section "Screen"
    Identifier  "Primary Screen"
    Device      "Primary Card"
    Monitor     "Primary Monitor"
    DefaultDepth 16
    Subsection "Display"
        Depth       16
Modes "1024x768" "800x600" "720x576" "720x480" "640x480" "640x400" "512x384" "480x300" "400x300" "320x240" "320x200"
        ViewPort    0 0
        Virtual     0 0
    EndSubsection
EndSection

Section "DRI"
    Mode 0666
EndSection

Other technical information is available from Xorg log attached, all ports are up to date; feel free to request for more.

Also note googleearth works well with 6.9 version of X.org (tested for different videocards)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: For me simply running googleearth for 7.2 xserver triggers it, by may be configuration-dependant
